overview: Annamacharya Institute of Technology and Sciences, Hayathnagar, is a private engineering campus at Piglipur/Blatasingaram in the Hayathnagar side of Hyderabad. Published admissions directories tied to the official website describe it as a JNTUH-affiliated institute of the Annamacharya group serving engineering and management students in Ranga Reddy district.
accreditation: AICTE approved; affiliated to JNTUH; published Telangana admissions directories list the institute as autonomous and NAAC-accredited.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech - Civil, CSE, CSE (Data Science), CSE (AI and ML), ECE, EEE, Mechanical

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Fee not clearly published on current public pages
Fee not clearly published on current public pages
Fee not clearly published on current public pages

admissions.admissionProcess: B.Tech admissions are handled through TG EAPCET counseling, with lateral-entry admissions through TG ECET. Published admissions pages for the institute also reference postgraduate and management admissions through the relevant Telangana entrance routes.
admissions.importantDates: TG EAPCET, TG ECET, TG ICET, and TG PGECET schedules are notified by Telangana authorities each cycle; institute-level updates are typically reflected through the official website and admissions directories.

campus.specialNote: Published pages place the campus at Piglipur, Blatasingaram, Hayathnagar, Hyderabad.

contact.address: Piglipur, Blatasingaram, Hayathnagar, Hyderabad - 501512, Telangana, India
